title: 2satw_ pack
description: A texture pack which is vanilla and got every edge of pvp advantage you can't get by a texture pack with all the utils
body:
This PvP texture pack sticks 99% to vanilla Minecraft—keeps the original vibe while adding subtle QoL tweaks for better competitive play. No distractions, just smart upgrades.It consist of all the pvp utils someone can think of and will be updated as new utils get discovered according to different versions of game.

Since the pack is 99% vanilla it can also be used as overlay, for that you need to have both the pack in which this pack should be in top of the other one / very top of the resource pack section

**_
Features:
_**

-Sharpened, vanilla-accurate textures

-Better PvP visibility (ores, particles, effects)

Clearer items/UI for quick reactions

Less clutter, no balance changes

Works great for SMP, duels, all modes

No eating particles for gaps only , better shieldings and all makes it easy and PvP feels better overall

Most particles are small so the game runs smooth while looking (good + vanilla) at the same time 

Perfect for vanilla fans wanting a PvP edge!!
